heading: Payments
label: 53206 Payments
notes: Amendments2022—Subsec. (a)(2). inserted “or section 51307(b)” after “this section”.Pub. L. 117–263
amendments: Amendments2022—Subsec. (a)(2). inserted “or section 51307(b)” after “this section”.Pub. L. 117–263

children.heading: .—In general
children.label: 1 .—In general
children.text: The Secretary, subject to availability of appropriations and other provisions of this section, shall pay to the Contractor for an operating agreement, for each vessel that is covered by the operating agreement, an amount equal to $5,000,000 for each fiscal year 2021 through 2035.

children.heading: .—Timing
children.label: 2 .—Timing
children.text: This amount shall be paid in equal monthly installments at the end of each month. The amount shall not be reduced except as provided by this section or section 51307(b).

children.heading: .—Certification Required for Payment
children.label: b .—Certification Required for Payment
children.text: As a condition of receiving payment under this section for a fiscal year for a vessel, the Contractor for the vessel shall certify that the vessel has been and will be operated in accordance with section 53205(a)(1) for 365 days in each fiscal year. Up to thirty (30) days during which the vessel is drydocked, surveyed, inspected, or repaired shall be considered days of operation for purposes of this subsection.
not operated or maintained in accordance with an Operating Agreement under this chapter; or

children.heading: .—Reductions in Payments
children.label: d .—Reductions in Payments
children.text: With respect to payments under this chapter for a vessel covered by an Operating Agreement, the Secretary shall make a pro rata reduction for each day less than 365 in a fiscal year that the vessel is not operated in accordance with section 53205(a)(1), with days during which the vessel is drydocked or undergoing survey, inspection or repair to be considered days on which the vessel is operated as provided in subsection (b).
